name: Habit name
replacementHint: What good habit will you do instead?
cargoHint: If you slip on this, do this good deed right after — don't wait.
cargoPlaceholder: Give two dollars in charity, pray two rak'ahs…
startRitualHint: A short ritual that signals "I'm beginning." Same two-second move every time.
startRitualPlaceholder: Phone in another room, water on the desk…
endRitualHint: A short ritual that signals "I'm done." Closes the loop cleanly.
endRitualPlaceholder: Close the laptop, jot one line about what you did…
presetsBody: One-tap add for the habits you don't have yet.

twoMinuteStarter.eyebrow: How big do you want to start?
twoMinuteStarter.title: {name}
twoMinuteStarter.body: Start tiny. Build the habit first — you can scale up after 30 days.
